capability_family: Operating style, authority, governance, and decision discipline
rationale: Adapt only the doctrine already represented in the pinned public repositories and the public review contracts; do not copy private-estate files.

capability_family: Canonical vault, sandbox, promotion, belief revision, graph health, and Git
rationale: Merge the pinned public starter, powerpack, super-repo, and economy mechanisms into the Release 1.0 base vault and trigger-loaded vault operations.

capability_family: Research, clipping, source preservation, patterns, timeline, and retrieval
rationale: Merge the pinned public powerpack and context-pack mechanisms into Research; keep bulk corpus payloads deferred under the corpus contract.

capability_family: Self-learning, skill lifecycle, curator, memory routing, and doctrine updates
rationale: Adapt only public economy and source-repository mechanisms into routed skills; private implementation details remain outside the distribution.

capability_family: Hermes ops, health, gateway, reporting, mobile, token efficiency, and maintenance
rationale: Adapt the public agent-ops, health, reporting, and efficiency subset; defer gateway, mobile, and automation recipes to demand-gated releases.

capability_family: Tools, MCP, plugins, secret/env setup, and integration verification
rationale: The detailed estate is private and version-sensitive; Release 1.0 points to upstream Hermes documentation rather than copying recipes or secret-bearing setup.

capability_family: Delegation, task packets, workers, kanban, coding agents, and acceptance
rationale: Adapt public task-packet and verification patterns into Agent Ops while excluding private worker topology and live state.

capability_family: Software planning, TDD, debugging, build, review, Git, and handoffs
rationale: Most specialized content is in the private estate; use routed external pointers until a public-source, license, and demand review supports adaptation.

capability_family: Local LLM and local/cloud/hybrid deployment patterns
rationale: Deployment content is hardware- and topology-sensitive and has no Release 1.0 consumer evidence.

capability_family: Research-only markets, diligence, falsification, prediction, and calibration
rationale: Adapt public research and calibration mechanisms behind research-only boundaries; the market pack remains inert pending explicit demand and liability review.

capability_family: Documents, spreadsheets, presentations, media, browser/computer use, and creative workflows
rationale: The broad tool estate is private or maintained by upstream integrations; external pointers avoid stale vendoring and licensing risk.

capability_family: Fable-produced audit, calibration, and operating improvements
rationale: Public review dispositions are incorporated as contracts, but private Fable-produced payloads are not copied and require later source and sanitization review.
